max.description: Maximum number of tags allowed. Non-finite values disable the cap.

id.description: Stable id for the visible text input. Falls back to FormField context or a generated id.

value.description: Controlled tags. When provided, the parent owns the tag array.

defaultValue.description: Initial tags for uncontrolled usage. Ignored after mount.

allowDuplicates.description: Allow the same trimmed tag value to appear more than once.

autocapitalize.description: Autocapitalization hint forwarded to the visible text input.

enterkeyhint.description: Virtual-keyboard Enter hint forwarded to the visible text input.

inputmode.description: Virtual-keyboard input mode forwarded to the visible text input.

maxlength.description: Maximum pending-text length forwarded to the visible text input.

placeholder.description: Placeholder text shown while the pending tag input is empty.

readonly.description: Render the pending-tag input as read-only and make committed tags non-removable.

spellcheck.description: Spellcheck setting forwarded to the visible text input.

disabled.description: Disable the input and chip removal affordances.

name.description: Hidden input name used for native form submission; one hidden field is rendered per tag.

class.description: Additional class merged onto the root element.

aria-label.description: Accessible label applied when no labelled-by chain is present.

aria-invalid.description: Manual invalid-state override used when no inline validation message or FormField invalid state is active.

aria-labelledby.description: Element ids that label both the text input and the committed-tag listbox.

aria-describedby.description: Additional description ids composed into the visible input aria-describedby chain.
